title: untitled awesome modpack 3000
description: There is a fairly challenging advancement within that will open up the game and make it easier for those that prefer a simpler play-style, just wait for someone else to become a Lord of Space and ask nicely or stow away.
body:
![horse goes woosh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/H5b0ptxM/images/7a16eb6d2cb5d53bf41eaf6bfa2a185e54d71712.png)Get horse, gallop fast, get reins gallop faster, faster still get bejewelled reins, fastest horse with marvellous horse doping artifact but you'll probably never get one of those so stow your horse in a pouch for now.

you wanna go faster? you can go faster, faster than 100 blocks per second? ok, get diamond rails and woosh, still wanna go faster, enhanced rails go extra woosh, netherite rails go fastest woosh.
still wanna go faster? that's unreasonable but you can reach your destination almost instantly by teleporting so do that instead.
going fast or getting somewhere almost instantly not your thing and you just wanna fly around? ok be a bat.  

wanna phase through blocks? sure.  wanna see through lava? also sure.  wanna craft obsidian from cobblestone, see spoiler.  wanna see everything? ok, get patrick helm.  wanna be half a block tall? fine.  
### also optional: 
extra head space.
more stupendous things: incredibly rare artifacts that break the game in wonderful ways, don't try to get them though, i said they're incredibly rare.
you can, if you're very fortunate, craft a RDIS (like a TARDIS but can't deal with time) and become a space lord (like a time lord but less timey and more spacey), only one person do this though so make sure it's you by trying harder and doing faster than everyone else.

pls use **issues** link for any comments, queries, questions or suggestions

### activities
-  punching gravel
-  archaeology
-  collecting

### additional
-   premium dirt
-   soft sand
-   sci-fi teleporting
-   150+ custom helmets
-   helmets that will change the way you do some things
-   helmets that will change the way you craft specific things
-   helmets that will change the way you see everything
-   other truly stupendous custom items
-   custom mods
-   fair range of hammers
-   planet b


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

requires obsidian crafting helm, supplied in-game

</details>
